Localization.Description: The upgrade of virtual hardware on a virtual machine (compatibility)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to upgrade virtual hardware on a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is upgrading virtual hardware on virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} upgraded virtual hardware on a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
